expectations.text: Creates exactly one TeamCreate with tfx- prefix naming

expectations.evidence: 3x TaskCreate with { subject, metadata: { cli, role } }

expectations.text: Spawns 3 Agent wrappers with mode: bypassPermissions
Uses tfx-route.sh inside Agent wrapper (not direct codex/gemini)
expectations.evidence: bash ~/.claude/scripts/tfx-route.sh {role} '{subtask}' {mcp_profile}; direct codex exec is forbidden
TeamDelete always executed, max 30s wait, skipping causes infinite loop
agent-wrapper-rules.md provided 6-step interrupt protocol, dynamic timeout values, and 7 technical reasons for tfx-route.sh
